## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

This function can be called only by servers. Use of this function is optional. The default authentication requirement is [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLAuthenticate/neverAuthenticate]. This function may be called only when no session is active.

# SSLSetClientSideAuthenticate(_:_:)

**Function**

Specifies the requirements for client-side authentication.

## Declaration

```swift
func SSLSetClientSideAuthenticate(_ context: SSLContext, _ auth: SSLAuthenticate) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **context**: An SSL session context reference.
- **auth**: A flag setting the requirements for client-side authentication. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLAuthenticate] for possible values.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

## Discussion

This function can be called only by servers. Use of this function is optional. The default authentication requirement is [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLAuthenticate/neverAuthenticate]. This function may be called only when no session is active.
title: SSLSetClientSideAuthenticate(_:_:)
